description: Mono provides open banking, payments, and identity verification products for businesses. Its products let companies connect customer financial accounts, initiate payments, and run identity or business verification checks.
summary: mono.co exposes a documented REST API at https://api.withmono.com authenticated with a Mono secret key; the site also documents client SDKs for embedding Mono Connect, but no separate GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found for mono.co endpoints.
